title: KUDA Shaders
description: Detailed Minecraft gameplay compatible with Iris and OptiFine!

**WIP! Expect bugs and errors!** 

**This shader provides detailed Minecraft gameplay that's compatible with Iris and OptiFine!**

![KUDA Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63a6099805487e97736d473fcf52d3584e72bc2c_0.webp)

# 📝Introduction:
KUDA Shaders is a detailed and polished shader pack designed to enhance Minecraft’s visuals without adding unnecessary effects. It focuses on realistic lighting, dynamic fog, and clean color grading to create a balanced and immersive experience. With strong compatibility and flexibility with various features to choose from, it offers high-quality semi-realistic visuals while remaining lightweight (if customized in Iris shader pack options) and thus suitable for any modern PC!

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_04.png)

# 📥Installation:
This shader pack provides detailed Minecraft gameplay that's compatible with Iris and OptiFine! This shader is *made for* **all versions and snapshots between 1.6.1 and 26.1.1**.

⚠️**It is recommended to change the shader packs quality by going to Iris' shader pack options when loading the shader to suit your PCs components!** *If you load something too performance-intensive* (like _Ultra_ or _**Cinematic**_ mode), *your GPU will have a hard time to render everything and you will get very bad and unstable framerates!* Use the chart below to see what mode is best suitable for you:

| Shader pack quality | Suitable for |
| --- | --- |
| Lowest | Low-end PCs/laptops |
| Low | Low-end PCs/laptops |
| Medium | Low-end and medium-end PCs/laptops |
| High | Medium-end PCs/laptops |
| _Ultra_ | _Medium-end and high-end PCs/laptops_ |
| _**Cinematic**_ | _**High-end PCs/laptops only!**_ |

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_04.png)

# ✨Features:
Check them out in the Iris shader pack options menu (_default keybind to open Iris menu:_ "0")! 

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_04.png)

# 🛠️Versioning:
This shader pack uses the following versioning system:
- **Base pack:** standard versioning 
  - -> *e.g.* **1.4.0, 2.4.4,...**

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_04.png)
